name: Gloomhaven
description: Gloomhaven is Isaac Childres' seminal cooperative dungeon-crawler campaign — a 95-scenario branching saga across the dark city of Gloomhaven and its surrounding regions, with seventeen unlockable mercenary classes, a city map dotted with stickers and event cards, and a tactical card-driven combat engine that pairs hand-management with variable turn order. Famously held BoardGameGeek's #1 ranking for years. A campaign of months, sometimes years.
